extract: Basculin (Japanese: バスラオ Bassrao) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. Basculin has three forms: Red-Striped Form, Blue-Striped Form, and White-Striped Form, the final of which is sometimes considered a Hisuian form. Red-Striped and Blue-Striped Basculin were both introduced in Pokémon Black and White, while White-Striped Basculin was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. Red- and Blue-Striped Basculin are not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. White-Striped Basculin evolves into Basculegion when leveled up after losing at least 294 HP from recoil damage without fainting. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
